name: Sam Morril
bio: Sam Morril is an American stand-up comedian from New York City known for tightly written, dark one-liners and a dry, classic-club delivery. He was named one of Comedy Centrals Comics to Watch in 2011 and has made multiple late-night appearances on Conan. He has released specials including Positive Influence, Up on the Roof, and the Netflix hour Same Time Tomorrow, and co-hosts the podcast We Might Be Drunk with Mark Normand.

timeline.ev: Named one of Comedy Centrals Comics to Watch
Releases his first hour special, Positive Influence, on Comedy Central
Self-releases Up on the Roof, filmed during the pandemic
Releases the Netflix special Same Time Tomorrow
Releases Youve Changed and performs at Madison Square Garden

accolades: Co-host of the podcast We Might Be Drunk with Mark Normand

bits.t: It's A Great Time To Be A Guy
